name: Scrunchable Round Laundry Hamper Green Stitch Grid - Brightroom™
description:
Keeping your dirty clothes together is a breeze with this Scrunchable Round Stitch Grid Laundry Hamper from Brightroom™. Designed with a green stitch grid pattern for cool, unique style, this cylindrical hamper features two side handles that make it easy to transport to and from the laundry room. The hamper holds up to 384 cubic inches of laundry, and you can fold it down to save storage space when you aren't using it.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
